title: Appearance
questions: Do you think beauty helps you to be successful?
In which jobs is beauty linked to success?
Do you think people from other cultures see beauty differently?
Do you think people spend too much time and money on beauty?
How will you think about beauty at the age of 80?
Do you think the media portray an unrealistic image of beauty?
Would you prefer to be intelligent or beautiful?
Would you prefer to be wealthy or beautiful?
What is your opinion of beauty contests?
'The media decides what is beautiful or ugly.' Do you agree or disagree?
'Our so-called 'ideal' body image puts people (especially young people) under huge pressure and doesn't acknowledge that people come in all shapes and sizes.' What is your opinion?
